extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked with 300m remaining on finishing circuit climb after extended positioning battle, outsprinting ALAPHILIPPE and YATES.
tactical_patterns: HONORÉ and ALAPHILIPPE probed early circuit laps to force team positioning errors before decisive finale attacks materialized.
ROGLIČ executed Plan B sprint acceleration with 300m left, demonstrating Jumbo-Visma's tactical flexibility when VAN AERT unavailable.
Circuit finish with 20% ramp triggered repeated attacks every lap, systematically fragmenting peloton before final selection sprint.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: double-acceleration with 300m left shows climbing sprint form returning, executed alternate plan successfully.
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: probed early on circuit climbs showing rapid form return, podium finish signals imminent classics threat.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: followed all moves and contended finale sprint, positioning himself as sleeper GC threat on circuit finishes.
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: negative: struggling on circuit climbs before crash eliminated him, pre-race favoritism now questionable for mountain stages.
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: initiated attacks on finale circuit showing form resurgence, dragging GEOGHEGAN HART into contention unexpectedly.
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: neutral: animated in finale positioning but lacked final acceleration, top-10 indicates solid form without winning punch.
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: top-5 finish reveals unexpected climbing sprint capacity on steep circuit ramps.
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: benefited from CARTHY's attack to reach finale selection, demonstrating improved positioning compared to early stages.
rider_signals.LAFAY Victor: positive: challenged ROGLIČ in finale sprint on climbing finish, confirming punchy uphill acceleration beyond breakaway specialist role.
rider_signals.BAIS Davide: neutral: aggressive in breakaway wearing green jersey but caught before mountains points, showing points jersey ambition.
